title: OpenCode Tool Namespacing Convention
description: Defines the systematic namespacing convention for MCP tools and skills

rules.service: The service or system being interacted with (e.g., github, postgres, filesystem)
rules.resource: The specific resource within the service (e.g., issue, pr, query, file)
rules.action: The action being performed (e.g., create, review, execute, read, write)

validation.description: Three lowercase snake_case segments separated by underscores

exceptions: Tools that predate this convention should be migrated incrementally
Single-segment legacy tools may be allowed during transition period
